Publications

Selected publications

Wanyu Lin, Hao Lan, Baochun Li. “Generative Causal Explanations for Graph Neural Networks, ” in the Proceedings of the 38th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2021), Online, July 18-24, 2021

Wanyu Lin, Baochun Li. “Guardian: Evaluating Trust in Online Social Networks with Graph Convolutional Networks, ” in the Proceedings of IEEE INFOCOM 2021, Virtual Conference, May 10-13, 2021. [paper]


Wanyu Lin, Zhaolin Gao, Baochun Li. “Shoestring: Graph-Based Semi-Supervised Classification with Severely Limited Labeled Data, ” in the Proceedings of the 2020 IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR 2020), Seattle, Washington, June 16-18, 2020. [paper][slides]


Wanyu Lin, Zhaolin Gao, Baochun Li. “Guardian: Evaluating Trust in Online Social Networks with Graph Convolutional Networks, ” in the Proceedings of IEEE INFOCOM, Toronto, Canada, July 6-9, 2020. [paper][slides]


Wanyu Lin, Shengxiang Ji, Baochun Li. “Adversarial Attacks on Link Prediction Algorithms based on Graph Neural Networks, ” in the Proceedings of the 15th ACM ASIA Conference on Computer and Communications Security (ACM ASIACCS 2020), Taipei, Taiwan, October 5-9, 2020. [paper]


Wanyu Lin, Xu Yuan, Baochun Li, Cong Wang. “Muti-Client Searchable Encryption over Distributed Key-Value Store, ” in the Proceedings of IEEE International Conference on Smart Computing (SMARTCOMP 2017), Hong Kong, China, May 29-31, 2017.
